      "question": "What is the primary purpose of error detection and correction in a data link layer?",
      "options": ["A) To increase network speed", "B) To reduce network latency", "C) To detect and correct errors in data transmission", "D) To improve network security"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Error detection and correction is crucial to ensure the accuracy of data transmitted over a network. It helps to identify and correct errors that may occur
